scripts._comment_pages_build: Legacy Cloudflare Pages build script, deployment moved to Vercel. Kept for reference.
scripts.pages:build: pnpm --filter api-types build && cd apps/frontend && npx @cloudflare/next-on-pages@1
scripts.test: pnpm --filter server exec jest --runInBand && pnpm --filter media-processor test
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter api-types build && pnpm --filter frontend exec tsc && pnpm --filter server exec tsc
